A graph displaying pairs of numerical da: 作为坐标平面上的点的图表显示数数据对
As x increases, y also increases: 随着 x 增加,y 增加,y 也增加
As x increases, y decreases: 增加 x 增加, y 减少
What does no correlation look like?: 什么是没有关联 看起来像什么?
Points have no apparent pattern or trend: 要点没有明显的模式或趋势
Points closely follow a linear pattern: 点与线性模式密切相近
What is weak correlation?: 什么是薄弱的相互关系?
Points loosely follow a trend with lots: 分点随一个趋势而散散散偏松
Does correlation imply causation?: 相关性是否意味着因果关系?
No — correlation shows association, not: 否 - 相关显示关联性,而不是因果关系
The independent variable (x) that may in: 可能影响答复的独立变量(x)
The dependent variable (y) that may be a: 可能受影响的依附变量(y)
What type of data does a scatter plot di: 撒布图显示哪种类型的数据 ?
Bivariate (two-variable) numerical data: 双变量(两个变量)数字数据
